case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. JASKIRAT SANDHU

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-27-2020 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF FEB-23-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
